claim_boundary: These are capital-allocation, pricing, and valuation hypotheses for one exact repository state. They are not an appraisal, financing promise, capability claim, or substitute for retention, revenue, independent evaluation, and real-device evidence.

commercial_families.name: Archie + Maker
commercial_families.thesis: One resident intelligence and bounded execution family. Archie owns intent, context, continuity, coordination, and learned assistance; Maker owns authorized mutation, verification, delivery, and rollback.

commercial_families.name: Sideways
commercial_families.thesis: An independent local-first personal archive and discovery product whose ranking, ownership, import, and survival value remain useful without Archie.

routes.name: Sideways public discovery
routes.use_when: The person wants public discovery, ranking explanations, and a doorway into their owned archive.

routes.name: Sideways private home
routes.use_when: The person wants to import, save, arrange, revisit, back up, or restore their own material.

routes.name: Archie personal atelier
routes.use_when: The person needs to state an ambitious end state, assemble context and boundaries, preserve continuity, and hand off an evidence-bound objective.

routes.name: Maker software workshop
routes.use_when: The task requires authorized repository mutation, exact-base execution, verification, receipts, rollback, and delivery.

routes.name: Founder decision instrument
routes.use_when: Competing product directions need explicit reactions, rationale, retained losers, and an exportable decision receipt.

archie.product_identity: resident personal intelligence and coordination layer
archie.job_to_be_done: Turn an underspecified ambition into a persistent, attributable, reversible objective system and coordinate admitted faculties around it.
archie.current_truth: The repository has an installable runtime shell, objective packet, workspace substrate, evaluation and admission law, and a distillation pipeline; it does not yet contain an independently admitted generally capable model.

maker.product_identity: permissioned software execution and evidence engine
maker.job_to_be_done: Convert an exact end state into one leased, reviewable, verified change set with explicit authority, cost, provenance, and rollback.
maker.current_truth: The repository has substantial orchestration, lease, authority, verification, workspace, and delivery contracts, but open runtime-composition defects and absent admitted intelligence block a broad reliability claim.
promotion_gates: close maker orchestrator, plugin registry, and runtime-platform defects

sideways.product_identity: owned personal archive and sideways discovery network
not: root-lab and manual as separate products
sideways.job_to_be_done: Bring years of scattered digital life into an owned, remixable, restorable place and use it to discover people, artifacts, and scenes without surrendering the archive.
sideways.current_truth: This is the strongest current consumer-shaped product: import, local profile, private archive, media, places, backup and restore, deterministic ranking, and optional public authority exist, while automatic multi-device sync and full governance UI remain absent.

founder.job_to_be_done: Expose incompatible directions, collect explicit judgment, preserve rationale and losing ideas, and produce a deterministic receipt for the next experiment.
founder.current_truth: A useful local decision room exists, but it has no independent distribution, collaboration, or willingness-to-pay evidence.

monetization_hypothesis.bundled_value: included with Archie professional work and Expo evaluations

promotion_gates: measured reduction in false product promotion

expo.product_identity: independent multimodal capability exposition and promotion tournament
expo.job_to_be_done: Translate frontier capability into lived visual, sonic, speech, and persistent-world commissions, retain raw evidence, and select non-dominated embodiments.
expo.current_truth: The campaign constitution and issues exist; real multimodal exhibits, physical-device evidence, and an independent promotion tournament do not yet exist.
promotion_gates: blinded human preference and authorship evidence

retirements.assumption: Every URL is a separate product or company.
retirements.replacement: URLs are specialized surfaces inside two commercial families and one research system.

retirements.assumption: The root ranking laboratory and /manual/ are different Sideways products.
retirements.replacement: They are public-discovery and private-home entrances to one Sideways promise.

retirements.assumption: Maker should be marketed as a standalone consumer app.
retirements.replacement: Maker is the professional execution surface and enterprise engine of the Archie family.
Founder remains a low-cost decision instrument and Expo evaluation surface.

retirements.assumption: An Expo issue tree is already a multimodal product.
retirements.replacement: Expo remains withheld until exhibits and physical-device evidence exist.

market_anchors.observed_anchor: Individual plans begin around $20 monthly; teams around $40 per user monthly; high-usage tiers and enterprise controls raise the ceiling.
Self-serve ranges from free and $20 individual plans through $200 power-user plans; team full seats are listed around $40 monthly with a team minimum.
The business workspace is listed around $20 per member monthly, with custom agents using additional credits.
A durable personal collection product can support a generous free tier and charge for search, archive, backup, and advanced organization.
